children.text: “agency” means an Executive agency under section 105, but does not include the Government Accountability Office;

children.label: A
children.text: an individual paid under a statutory pay system defined in section 5302(1);

children.label: B
children.text: a prevailing rate employee, as defined in section 5342(a)(2); and

children.label: C
children.text: a category of employees included by the Office of Personnel Management following the review of an agency plan under section 5403(b)(1);

children.label: i
children.text: an individual paid at an annual rate of basic pay for a level of the Executive Schedule, under subchapter II of chapter 53, or at a rate provided for one of those levels under another provision of law;

children.label: ii
children.text: a member of the Senior Executive Service paid under subchapter VIII of chapter 53, or an equivalent system;

children.label: iii
children.text: an administrative law judge paid under section 5372;

children.label: iv
children.text: a contract appeals board member paid under section 5372a;

children.label: v
children.text: an administrative appeals judge paid under section 5372b; and

children.label: vi
children.text: an individual in a position which is excepted from the competitive service because of its confidential, policy-determining, policy-making, or policy-advocating character; and
“Office” means the Office of Personnel Management.
